                        </div>

                            Light

                      </button>
                      <button type="button" role="radio" aria-checked="false" data-state="unchecked" value="purple" tabindex="-1" data-radix-collection-item="" style={{display: "flex", position: "static", width: "24px", height: "24px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "center", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderWidth: "1px", borderStyle: "solid", borderColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 22 22" fill="none" style={{display: "block", position: "static", width: "22px", height: "22px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "hidden", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "center", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
                          <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="9" fill="#9B69FF" style={{display: "inline", position: "static", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "center", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(155, 105, 255)", strokeWidth: "1px"}} />
                        </svg>
                      </button>
                      <button type="button" role="radio" aria-checked="false" data-state="unchecked" value="green" tabindex="-1" data-radix-collection-item="" style={{display: "flex", position: "static", width: "24px", height: "24px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "center", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderWidth: "1px", borderStyle: "solid", borderColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 22 22" fill="none" style={{display: "block", position: "static", width: "22px", height: "22px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "hidden", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "center", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
                          <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="9" fill="#00D17E" style={{display: "inline", position: "static", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "center", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 209, 126)", strokeWidth: "1px"}} />
                        </svg>
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}
